x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Customer account and contact records are the entity anchors Now Assist CSM uses for AI-personalized responses.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure all CSM cases are linked to Account records at case creation. Enforce via mandatory field policy or case creation workflow. Import customer data from CRM systems if needed. Target: 90%+ of closed cases linked to an account.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c8b
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Customer account and contact records are the entity anchors Now Assist CSM uses for AI-personalized responses.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Customer Account and Contact Population</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // sn_customerservice_case.state is INTEGER: 3=Closed, 6=Resolved
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed CSM cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed CSM cases found in the last 12 months. Account linkage cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaWithAcct = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaWithAcct.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaWithAcct.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaWithAcct.addQuery('account', '!=', '');
    gaWithAcct.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaWithAcct.query();
    var withAcct = gaWithAcct.next() ? parseInt(gaWithAcct.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((withAcct / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed CSM cases have account linked (last 12 months, ' + withAcct + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 90) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed CSM cases are linked to an account. Now Assist CSM has strong customer context for personalized AI responses.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 70) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed CSM cases have an account linked (target: 90%). Now Assist CSM personalization will be limited for unlinked cases.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed CSM cases have an account linked. Now Assist CSM cannot provide meaningful personalized AI responses without customer account context.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CSM</module>
<number>CHK0006039</number>
<order>20</order>
<remediation_guidance>Ensure all CSM cases are linked to Account records at case creation. Enforce via mandatory field policy or case creation workflow. Import customer data from CRM systems if needed. Target: 90%+ of closed cases linked to an account.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c8b</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
